items.question: Do you offer delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver through DoorDash. You can also call ahead for pickup.

items.question: Do you take reservations?
items.answer: We are first-come, first-served. For parties of 8 or more, call ahead and we will do our best to accommodate you.

items.question: Can you accommodate dietary restrictions?
items.answer: Many of our dishes are naturally gluten-free. We can prepare most items without cheese or dairy on request. Let your server know.

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: We are open Tuesday through Sunday, 11 AM to 9 PM. Closed Mondays.
